summary: Iteration 43: Comprehensive testing of Phase 2 production optimization features. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. Frontend: All requested features verified working. Key fixes confirmed: (1) Strategy status shows 'active' not 'stopped', (2) Per-strategy slot counts (weather/crypto/arb/unknown), (3) Watchdog shows None/N/A instead of 9999, (4) Arb reserved slots bypass global limit.

issues: Weather bucket shows 54/25 active (over max limit of 25) - this is EXPECTED behavior since existing positions don't get closed when limit is reduced. Risk engine correctly blocks NEW weather positions.

backend_api_tests: GET /api/status - all 3 strategies present (arb_scanner, crypto_sniper, weather_trader) - PASS
GET /api/status - all strategies have enabled=true - PASS
GET /api/status - all strategies have status='active' (NOT stopped) - PASS
position_slots has weather_count, crypto_count, arb_count, unknown_count (NOT nonweather_count) - PASS
position_slots.limits has max_weather=25, max_crypto=20, max_arb=20, max_global=65 - PASS
position_slots.headroom has weather, crypto, arb, global keys with numeric values - PASS
position_slots.sizing has crypto=5.0, weather=3.0, arb=2.0 - PASS
Watchdog minutes_since_* values are None (not 9999) when events haven't occurred - PASS
No 9999 value anywhere in watchdog response - PASS
Watchdog uptime_minutes is positive number - PASS
Arb headroom = max_arb - arb_count (reserved slots working) - PASS
Signal quality has per-strategy rejection reasons - PASS
frontend_ui_tests: Overview page - Active Strategies section shows green dots with 'active' label (NOT stopped) - PASS
Analytics > Signal Quality tab - Position Slots section shows 4 columns: Weather, Crypto, Arb, Global - PASS
Analytics > Signal Quality tab - Each column shows Active count, Headroom, and Size - PASS
Analytics > Signal Quality tab - Shows rejection reasons per strategy (tte, insufficient_vol_data) - PASS
Analytics > Watchdog tab - Shows timestamps with 'N/A' for unrecorded events (NOT 9999) - PASS
Analytics > Watchdog tab - Discovery Watchdog shows Last New Market, Last Trade Opened, Last Trade Closed - PASS
Analytics > Watchdog tab - Strategy Performance (Tracker) shows all strategies - PASS
Arb reserved slots working - Arb headroom=15 while global headroom=0 - PASS

features_verified.Per-strategy position sizing (crypto=$5,: PASS - sizing field verified in API and UI
features_verified.Watchdog bug fix (no 9999 values): PASS - timestamps show None/N/A when unrecorded
features_verified.Strategy status fix (active not stopped): PASS - all 3 strategies show status='active' in API and 'active' label in UI
features_verified.Arb priority execution (reserved slots): PASS - arb_headroom=15 while global_headroom=0 confirms arb bypasses global limit
features_verified.4-column slot display in UI: PASS - Weather, Crypto, Arb, Global columns shown with headroom and sizing

critical_code_review_comments: Weather bucket showing 54 positions active vs max 25 is EXPECTED - existing positions are not closed when limit is reduced. The risk engine correctly blocks NEW weather positions.
Unknown count shows 0 in API but UI shows 'unknown: 59' in positions by strategy - these are legacy positions without explicit strategy_id that were classified by keyword matching.
seed_data_creation: None - tested with live MongoDB data
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Phase 2 production optimization features verified: (1) Per-strategy reserved slots working with correct limits (weather=25, crypto=20, arb=20, global=65). (2) Strategy status shows 'active' not 'stopped' - bug fixed in core.py. (3) Watchdog no longer shows 9999 values - shows None/N/A for unrecorded events. (4) Arb priority execution confirmed - arb has headroom=15 while global headroom=0, proving reserved slots bypass global limit. (5) Position sizing per strategy (crypto=$5, weather=$3, arb=$2) visible in API and UI. (6) Signal Quality tab shows 4-column layout with per-strategy rejection breakdown.
